message:
fix(demo_showcase): cross-platform suseconds_t cast for macOS

On macOS, libc::suseconds_t is i32 but timeout.subsec_micros()
returns u32. From<u32> is not implemented for i32 (would overflow
for values > i32::MAX). Since subsec_micros() is always < 1_000_000,
the cast is safe. Use explicit `as` cast with clippy allow for
cross-platform compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
